summary: Referral System Iteration 16 testing completed. Backend: 17/20 tests passed (85%). All core referral APIs working correctly. Frontend: My Team page fully functional with all sections. Fixed critical import errors in EarningsDashboard.jsx and Withdraw.jsx that were blocking frontend compilation.

minor.issue: 3 tests failed due to session cookie persistence in pytest - endpoints correctly return 401 when tested with curl without cookies

passed_tests: Backend: API health check
Backend: GET /api/referral/genealogy - Returns L1/L2 downlines only
Backend: GET /api/referral/genealogy requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/referral/daily-claim/status - Returns claim status with amount (2000 regular, 5000 diamond)
Backend: POST /api/referral/daily-claim - Claims daily BL coins (or returns 429 if on cooldown)
Backend: GET /api/diamond/status - Returns qualification progress
Backend: POST /api/diamond/check-qualification - Checks and promotes if eligible
Backend: GET /api/kyc/status - Returns KYC verification status
Backend: POST /api/kyc/init - Initializes KYC verification (manual fallback working)
Backend: GET /api/withdrawal/status - Returns withdrawal eligibility with 1% fee rate and $10 min
Backend: GET /api/withdrawal/history - Returns withdrawal history
Backend: GET /api/diamond/disclaimer - Returns legal disclaimer text
Backend: GET /api/referral/my-stats - Returns referral statistics
Backend: GET /api/referral/upline - Returns L1/L2 upline info
Backend: GET /api/referral/balances - Returns BL coins and USD balance
Backend: GET /api/reassignment/admin/list - Correctly requires admin access (403)
Backend: User referral code exists and matches expected value
Frontend: My Team page loads at /my-team
Frontend: Referral code section displays with copy and share buttons
Frontend: Stats row shows L1, L2 counts and BL Coins
Frontend: Daily BL Claim section with countdown timer
Frontend: Diamond Leader section with qualification progress bars
Frontend: Withdraw Earnings section with KYC status
Frontend: My Team Tree shows genealogy with L1/L2 members
Frontend: Commission Structure shows regular (3%/1%) and diamond (4%/2%) rates
Frontend: Privacy notice displayed
Frontend: Wallet page has link to My Team
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed import errors in EarningsDashboard.jsx - was importing non-existent networkAPI and commissionsAPI
Fixed import errors in Withdraw.jsx - was importing withdrawalsAPI (with 's') instead of withdrawalAPI
KYC verification falls back to manual verification when Stripe Identity API key is not configured for Identity API
All referral system routers properly registered in server.py

success_rate.backend: 85% (17/20 tests passed - 3 failures due to test session cookie issue, not actual bugs)

seed_data_creation: Used existing test users from main agent
context_for_next_testing_agent: Referral system fully tested. All APIs working: /api/referral/genealogy, /api/referral/daily-claim, /api/diamond/status, /api/diamond/check-qualification, /api/diamond/disclaimer, /api/kyc/status, /api/kyc/init, /api/withdrawal/status, /api/withdrawal/history, /api/reassignment/admin/list. Frontend My Team page at /my-team fully functional. EarningsDashboard.jsx and Withdraw.jsx were fixed for import errors. KYC uses manual verification fallback since Stripe test key doesn't support Identity API.
